content: Free backups are used first. Will be automatically renewed <1>on {{date}}</1>

comment.text: This key displays the renewal date for free backups. It appears on the Backup Page within the Portal Settings, informing users when their free backup allowance will automatically renew. The `<date>` variable should be replaced with the localized date format.

usage.context:
{!isFreeTariff ? (
 <Text className={styles.backupPaidInfo}>
 <Trans
 t={t}
 ns="Services"
 i18nKey="FreeBackupsRenewsDate"
 values={{
 date: formatDateLocalized(
 now()
 .setZone(window.timezone)
 .startOf("month")
